choices.text: Include specific textual references, including at least one direct quote from the original play text (with citation, scene, act number given literally, no matter which edition, translation, or text you are sourcing from, and absolutely do not change or interpret the quote in any way, shape, or form, make sure to verbatim copy it word-for-word, letter-for-letter, punctuation-for-punctuation, spacing-for-spacing, indentation-for-indentation, capitalization-for-capitalization, and bolded-and-italicized parts as they appear verbatim in the original text, and do not change or
